title: GIIA Online Examination Portal
description: Designed and developed a full ISO-compliant online examination portal for the Global Institute of Internal Auditing — featuring structured question banks, timed exams, result tracking, and automated scoring. Improved exam administration efficiency and standardization across all courses.

title: Automated Audit Exception Reminder
description: Built a Python-based automation system that tracks open audit exceptions and dispatches scheduled email reminders to responsible owners, ensuring timely closure of compliance findings and reducing manual follow-up overhead at Africa Prudential Plc.

title: Corporate TIN Validation Script
description: Developed an automated Python script that validates over 10,000 Corporate Tax Identification Numbers against the FIRS verification portal, enabling data enrichment and accurate remittance processing for the finance team.

title: Nuban Validator & Comparison Tool
description: Built a Python tool to validate and cross-check NUBAN (Nigeria Uniform Bank Account Numbers) across datasets, ensuring data integrity and accurate account identification during audit and reconciliation processes.

title: 1-Million QR Code Generator
description: Generated over 1 million unique QR codes using Python for the physical identification and tracking of electricity infrastructure assets across multiple business units at BEDC Electricity Plc. Dramatically improved asset traceability and field operations.

title: Automated Excel File Splitter
description: Developed a Python automation tool for the finance department that intelligently splits large Excel workbooks into structured sub-files based on defined criteria — saving over 50 hours of manual effort per reporting cycle.
